description: We chose Incentivate because the over all buying process was smooth. They involve their delivery team in the process which helps uncover a lot of nuances upfront and ensures the delivery is managed in a timely manner.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Accurate Incentive Calculation- Fast - Contests to motivate sales people- Great Visual Dashboards
cons: Upon a comprehensive evaluation, it is evident that Incentivate demonstrates remarkable efficiency and effectiveness in its incentive automation services, with no significant shortcomings or cons that warrant notable concern.

review_title: The process was detailed and efficient

author: Terrill H.
pros: They are adaptable, filling in the gaps as needed while adhering to the guidelines we had established together
cons: They delivered exactly what we asked for with a high level of quality and efficiency, I have absolutely no criticisms
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall it was a good and smooth experience till now. (few more incentive types to be rolled out though)

pros: Easy platform base is used, and a dedicated team is also quick respondent.
cons: When activation link to send to the user - make sure it has validity of atleast 3 to 4 days.

review_title: Always willing to make recommendations for growth, nice product

pros: I am impressed with the professionalism and experience which they possess and their proactiveness
cons: They struggled when it comes to changing of priorities especially when they already had an action plan for a particular direction
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great experience of using Incentivate Dashboards
description: The overall experience was great - the incentive dasboard were well received by the employees.
author: Tushar B.
pros: The Incentivate team is very responsiveness and ensured that the project was delivered in timely manner. They navigated the entire end-to-end process, from crafting the business requirement document to executing the final implementation in a streamlined manner. Notably, the team integrated our feedback and maintained timely communication throughout. They also provided great post-implementation support that underlined their commitment to success.
cons: They can expand their existing collection of standard dashboards and reports, offering enhanced insights to the customers.

description: A perfect 10/10 experience with Incentivate! It has truly simplified my life. It's incredibly easy to stay on top of my pay and anticipate what to expect.
author: Shivraj B.
pros: Incentivate has been quite helpful in tracking incentives and ensuring that I have complete visibility into my monthly earnings. Ability to raise queries in regard to commission earned at opportunity level is great. Saves a lot of time spent in back n forth through emails/calls.
cons: The software is excellent, and I don't have any major complaints. However, to gain a deeper understanding of the platform and explore ways to further enhance our experience, I believe having more training opportunities would be beneficial.

review_title: Flexibility and clarity in Commission Tracking
description: The Incentivate team demonstrated a willingness to understand our plans and accommodate both our team and individual requirements. Unlike other platforms where we had to adjust our incentive calculation methods, Incentivate was remarkably flexible and receptive to changes regarding our incentive plans.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The tool's adaptability, along with the team's flexibility, is truly fantastic. There are no platform restrictions whatsoever. Commissions are conveniently emailed directly to you, and it's effortless to comprehend the breakdown of each deal alongside your commission rate. It's exceptionally easy to understand and manage.
cons: Their onboarding documentation has room for improvement.

review_title: Transparency, User Friendly & Ease of Use
description: Saving Previous Time & Info on finger tips to achieve delight.
author: Ramrao J.
pros: The features are vividly transparent, functions are easy to use, simulations of "What If" is great.
cons: Colours are very bright, need to make it sober.

pros: Finding how much performance did i received..

cons: Disbursement details should be mapped with the same, this will give much clarity as to how transparently disbursement are happening with its cycle as well.

review_title: They were really a pleasure to work with and we enjoyed the collaboration with them

pros: Their communication skills and reliability were very impressive, they are truly exceptional
cons: Although they delivered the project perfectly, it would have been better if they had added some extra features and bells to the delivered project

review_title: I regard them as an important part of our company
description: They demonstrate exceptional reliability, their level of commitment to time management builds trust and provides us with confidence
author: Artur B.
pros: Their technical expertise, extensive knowledge and willingness to assist were truly outstanding which shows their level of commitment
cons: I have been really satisfied with the experience so far, the collaboration was smooth and highly productive

review_title: They have a strong team and excellent project management
description: We are satisfied with their performance, they also communicate effectively, they also provide technically sound suggestions
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We both had a kind of partner relationship other than a vendor relationship and always provided us with suggestions
cons: Nothing, there is nothing available for them to improve, but it would be awesome to get some little issues covered
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The overall experience was amazing. The implementation process was extremely smooth. We solved many challenges by shifting to Incentivate. Got rid of the manual calculation process. Salesforce finally got more clarity in terms of their incentives. Calculation of our complex incentive plans got simpler due to the automation. Saving a lot of time and effort now.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The product is very easy to use, with extremely visual dashboards. They integrate with multiple CRMs hence the integration process was extremely smooth. Love the What-if calculator and their WhatsApp integration features too. The dashboards are very intriguing and they have a dispute management feature too. Covers everything that's needed. Incredible user experience:)
cons: None. Liked everything about Incentivate. The integration process went pretty well too. Didn't face any difficulty.

review_title: Most flexible and reliable commissions management platform
description: Decent Decent experience. The team comes with significant experience in the incentives field. It was apparent right from during the vendor evaluation process. They are not too rigid and it’s a very important aspect as you are always figuring out your processes in their entirety and may miss a few things. We loved the fact that they delivered as per our timelines as we have had bad experiences with other vendors in the past. The solution has helped us eliminate a significant chunk of manual calculations. From a field standpoint, our main issue was a lack of transparency. Field, today is pretty happy with the incentive reports/scorecards and we can see a decent uptick in engagement levels.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: You can configure any complex rule using Incentivate. Our plan keeps on changing every quarter and we have run out of time to accommodate these in the previous solutions. Incentivate’s no-code ability helps us go live in time with these changes. Additionally, out-of-the-box integrations with CRMs help us save time on manual uploads and more importantly remove the dependency on individuals. They have an inbuilt What-If calculator and in our case, they developed a custom one as well. They have a team in India and it was a pleasure working with them despite operating across different time zones
cons: Maybe a bit more visual in nature would have been helpful.

description: "My overall experience has been positive, with clear insights into my sales performance and timely commission updates."
author: Alexander S.
pros: "What stood out for me is the interactive visual dashboards, making it easy to understand my performance."
cons: "No significant drawbacks noticed so far."

review_title: Flexible and open to our changes
description: For me, their USP is their understanding of the business. Other vendors have almost zero knowledge of our business. However, team at Incentivate is different. They understood our business pretty well, knew what kind of changes would be required, and were able to abide by them.
author: Andrew R.
pros: Unwanted interactions with reps have reduced drastically because most of their queries have been solved since we started using Incentivate. They just log in and see everything they want to know. The team is very open, approachable, and extremely flexible. Incentivate adjusted their tool to our data, took the data as-is, and created everything. Our data flows from upstream tools/CRMs into Incentivate; we do not have to modify the way we manage data.
cons: The only complain I have is - I just wish I had Incentivate earlier!

description: "My experience with Incentivate has been largely positive, enhancing my ability to track and understand my sales performance efficiently."
author: Scott D.
pros: "I appreciate the transparency and detailed calculations on the dashboards, making it easy to track my performance."
cons: "I haven't encountered any major issues yet."

description: I have used Incentivate for tracking my closures, it’s very accurate

pros: Accuraccy of the dashboard, look and feel of home page
cons: Data Analytics diagrams needs some better customization
